name: Chocolate Cherry Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant Chocolate Pudding Mix, 4 servings
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the graham crackers using a rolling pin between sheets of wax paper.
2. Combine the crushed crackers with sugar and melted butter. Stir until well mixed.
3. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes, then cool before filling.
5. Prepare the pudding according to the package instructions for pie filling.
6. Chill for 30 minutes, spread the pudding into the crust.
7. Spread Cool Whip carefully on top of the pudding layer.
8. Spoon cherries over the top and chill for 2 hours before serving.
